name: Select Translation
description: Provides a Views filter to select which translation of a node should be displayed.
note: Installed release is 2.0.0-alpha5 (an alpha; the only 2.0.x release at time of documenting). Version directory is kept as 2.0.x per the major.minor.x convention. The module ships no config schema of its own — the Views filter's options (value, priorities, default_language_only, include_content_with_unpublished_translation) are stored inline in the host view config entity (views.view.*), not in a dedicated schema file. The composer.json 'description' field upstream is a copy-paste placeholder ('Example Project is a lightweight PHP class...'); the real description is the info.yml one used here.
